name: WILLIS LEASE FINANCE CORP
summary: Willis Lease Finance Corporation (WLFC) is a leading lessor and servicer of commercial aircraft and aircraft engines. The company acquires and leases jet engines and aircraft to commercial operators and MROs worldwide, earning lease rent and maintenance reserve revenues. As of December 31, 2025, it held $2,801.7 million in operating lease assets including 363 engines, 20 aircraft, and one marine vessel across 69 lessees in 37 countries. Its subsidiary Willis Aero sells aircraft engine parts and materials.
